blended.narrative: Canyon Ski Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing rain, highs of 48°F.
Tomorrow: light freezing rain, highs of 43°F.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
